emptyHint: Start recording — the transcript will appear here in real time

deviceError.microphoneMessage:
Unable to access your microphone. Please check that:
• Your microphone is connected
• The app has microphone permissions
• No other app is using the microphone
deviceError.systemAudioMessage:
Unable to capture system audio. Please check that:
• A virtual audio device (like BlackHole) is installed
• The app has screen recording permissions (macOS)
• System audio is properly configured
deviceError.permissionMessage:
Recording permissions are required. Please:
• Grant microphone access in System Settings
• Grant screen recording access for system audio (macOS)
• Restart the app after granting permissions
deviceError.failedMessage: Unable to start recording. Please check your audio device settings and try again.

notification.title: Recording started
notification.description: Let participants know that the meeting is being recorded.

summaryFailed.title: Summary failed
summaryFailed.body: See the meeting window for details.
